narrative:
Cuy Falls 5-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,172 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
